system.effect: First technique of the Crashing Wave path. When you successfully Parry an incoming attack, you may voluntarily reduce the Height of your Parry set by 1 to gain +1d on your next attack roll against that same opponent.
Second technique. If you form a set wider than 2x when rolling to Parry, your attacker suffers a -1d penalty on their next action. Requires Ebbing Tide (Example).
